ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "tweet_text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the tweet was posted */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been retweeted */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been liked */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the tweet */,
  "quote_count" INTEGER /* Number of quotes of the tweet */,
  "conversation_id" TEXT /* ID of the conversation the tweet belongs to */,
  "lang" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the tweet */,
  "tweet_type" TEXT /* Type of the tweet (e.g., tweet, retweet, reply, quote) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name of the user */,
  "description" TEXT /* User-supplied description of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "follower_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  "tweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of tweets the user has posted */,
  "listed_count" INTEGER /* Number of lists the user is a member of */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the user's account was created */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet where the mention occurred */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the mentioned user */,
  "screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name of the mentioned user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the mentioned user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_mentions_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_mentions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet where the hashtag occurred */,
  "hashtag_text" TEXT /* Text of the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hashtags_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet related to the topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_topics_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retweets" (
  "retweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retweet */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the original tweet */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who retweeted */,
  "retweet_date" TEXT /* Date the tweet was retweeted */,
  "retweet_text" TEXT /* Text of the retweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet that was liked */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who liked */,
  "like_date" TEXT /* Date the tweet was liked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quotes" (
  "quote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quote */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the quote tweet */,
  "quoted_tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the quoted tweet */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who quoted */,
  "quote_date" TEXT /* Date the tweet was quoted */,
  "quote_text" TEXT /* Text of the quote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotes_quoted_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("quoted_tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotes_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the reply tweet */,
  "in_reply_to_tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet being replied to */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who replied */,
  "reply_date" TEXT /* Date the tweet was replied to */,
  "reply_text" TEXT /* Text of the reply */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_in_reply_to_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("in_reply_to_tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet containing the media */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., photo, video) */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of the media */,
  "media_description" TEXT /* Description of the media */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet containing the URL */,
  "url" TEXT /* Original URL */,
  "expanded_url" TEXT /* Expanded URL */,
  "display_url" TEXT /* Display URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urls_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follower */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "follower_user_id" TEXT /* ID of the follower */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_followers_follower_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("follower_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_following" (
  "following_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each following */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user doing the following */,
  "following_user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user being followed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("following_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_following_following_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("following_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_following_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
